creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Denis Shaposhnikov from comment #37)

That's exactly the situation I'm asking about. But from the point when you DON'T have static ccache on host and NO packages in poudriere repo.
You absolutely will encounter circular dependency (ccache4->cmake->ccache4->...) issue in this case, and I believe this PR won't move anywhere until this will be circumvented somehow.
